title: Smoky French Feta Salad
description: A French-inspired salad featuring smoky flavors, crispy textures, and tangy feta cheese.

ingredients.name: Vinaigrette
ingredients.notes: Made with olive oil and balsamic vinegar

instructions: In a large bowl, combine mixed greens and Japanese pickled carrots.
In a pan, cook smoky bacon until crispy. Chop into small pieces.
Cut feta cheese into small cubes.
Cube baguette into small pieces and toast until crispy.
In a small bowl, whisk together vinaigrette ingredients.
Add chopped bacon, feta cheese, and crispy baguette croutons to the bowl with mixed greens.
Drizzle vinaigrette over the salad and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
